violations.text: Establishment did not have an employee present at the time of inspection that has taken an approved food safety managers course. Establishment must have an employee certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC to send inspector proof of enrollment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the cold-hold units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

The outside cardboard dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023

The floor near the sink area has an accumulation of water. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
